subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Be not distressed by hardships and tribulations, for thou art a partner of 'Abdu'l-Bahá in partaking of this cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از مشاکل و غوائل محزون مشو زیرا شریک عبدالبهاءای از این جام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
